synopsis:
Star Wars Adventures (2020) #04 is the fourth issue of the Star Wars Adventures (2020) comic series. The comic is written by Michael Moreci, illustrated by Megan Levens, and released by IDW Publishing.
Join the Wookiees of Kashyyyk for part one of a special Life Day celebration! Plus, an exciting adventure featuring a beloved bounty hunter!
title: Star Wars Adventures (2020) #04 - Life Day part 2
